mapper.select: /** UsptRsltIdxIemHistDao.selectList */ select uriih.rslt_hist_id , uriih.rslt_idx_iem_id , uriih.pruf_attachment_id , ubri.rslt_idx_nm , ubri.rslt_idx_type_cd from uspt_rslt_idx_iem_hist uriih inner join uspt_rslt_idx_iem urii on urii.rslt_idx_iem_id = uriih.rslt_idx_iem_id inner join uspt_bsns_rslt_idx ubri on ubri.rslt_idx_id = urii.rslt_idx_id where uriih.rslt_hist_id = #{rsltHistId} order by ubri.rslt_idx_id
